description_long: This is a metallic ring featuring a double row of small, clear gemstones set along the outer circumference, with a prominent central gemstone at the front. The band is smooth and polished, likely made of a silvery metal such as white gold or platinum. The gemstones are uniformly cut and closely set, creating a continuous sparkling effect around the band. The central stone is larger and more pronounced, serving as the focal point of the design. The interior of the band is plain and unadorned, providing comfort for the wearer. The overall style is elegant and modern, suitable for formal or everyday wear.
description: A polished metallic ring with two rows of small clear gemstones and a larger central stone, exuding a modern, elegant style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the prominent central gemstone and the double rows of smaller stones encircling the band.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the continuous rows of gemstones and the raised central stone.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned back of the band with no visible gemstones.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again showing the double rows of stones and the central gemstone from a different perspective.
